message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should be in the cheap price range
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 3 people and 2 nights starting from monday
If the booking fails how about 1 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the same price range as the hotel and should serve chinese food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 13:15 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
